content: Task bootstrap for Memory Operation Selection. Target capability: Dynamic Memory Routing.
Research task with multiple phases: 1) Recent constraints on output format, 2) Version tracking for dependencies, 3) Reusable search procedure.
Phase 1: Output must be CSV with columns title,year,venue. This is ephemeral constraint.
Phase 2: Python version changed from 3.10 to 3.11 mid-task. Need state tracking with version chain.
Record version update in state_memory with supersession chain.
Phase 3: Successfully executed search workflow. Extract reusable procedure for future tasks.
Create memory_routing.json showing: constraints -> context_cache, versions -> state_memory, workflow -> procedural_memory.
Quality check: No misrouted items. Each fact stored in appropriate memory form with justification.
Document routing rationale: why each subtask used specific memory form.
